entries.summary: Phase 4 completed: 6 P1 API Contract & Documentation tasks. Fixed /search documentation alignment, CORS method restrictions, /stats information leakage, consolidated validate_url with proper userinfo rejection, fixed bare exception handling, and implemented comprehensive path traversal protection. 2 minor drifts identified and justified: CORS correctly includes DELETE for existing endpoint, /stats code fix needs USAGE.md doc update.

metadata.plan_id: QA Findings Remediation — Document Q&A Assistant

lessons_learned: Documentation must be updated when API responses change
CORS configuration must match actual API endpoints
Path traversal protection needs multiple layers: .. detection + path containment
Shared validators ensure consistent security policy

entries.summary: Phase 4 completed all 3 tasks: build system already updated (4.1), test files cleaned of removed LLM class references with Gemma 4 detection tests added (4.2), documentation updated to remove OpenVINO/Ollama references and add CHANGELOG (4.3).
lessons_learned: Test files that import removed classes at module level (from X import Y) cause collection errors, while deferred imports inside test functions only fail at runtime — fix module-level imports first
When mocking lazy imports (imported inside __init__), mock the ORIGINAL module path (llama_cpp.Llama), not the importing module (llm_interface.Llama)
Build system files may already be updated from prior sessions — verify before delegating changes
pre_check_batch flags pre-existing test code issues (assert statements, test fixture secrets) — these are not blocking for test file changes
